case_title: KURZ, HANS VS SCHUMAKER, ROGER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KURZ, HANS AS TO DEFENDANT SCHUMAKER, ROGER S.F. RESIDENCE CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PLTFDECL:HAS NOT DEMANDED ADD'L AMT OF $500.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHUMAKER, ROGER S.F. RESIDENCE CLUB PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
